---
title: "report_counterfactual_minimum_wage_oligopoly"
author: "Daisy Dan Song"
date: "2024-04-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  results = "hide"
  )
rm(list = ls())
library(Dispatching)
library(foreach)
library(magrittr)
library(codetools)
library(ggplot2)
library(kableExtra)
```

# Set constant

```{r}
seed <- 1
set.seed(seed)
n_ths <- 3
n_market <- 1
n_zone <- 1
t <- 1
j <- 1
multistart <- 20
```


# Generate the baseline equilibrium

```{r}
equilibrium <-
  generate_equilibrium(
    n_ths = n_ths,
    n_market = n_market,
    n_zone = n_zone,
    seed = seed
  )
```

# Counterfactual Analysis {.tabset}

## Minimum wage {.tabset}
```{r}
eq1_nleqslv <-
  solve_equilibrium_tj(
    t = t,
    j = j,
    equilibrium = equilibrium,
    solver = "nleqslv",
    multistart = multistart
  )
equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w <- eq1_nleqslv$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w
equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$f <- eq1_nleqslv$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$f

counterfactual <- 
  evaluate_counterfactual_minimum_wage_tj(
    t = t,
    j = j,
    equilibrium = equilibrium,
    solver = "nleqslv",
    multistart = multistart
  )
```

### table 
```{r, results = "asis"}
counterfactual %>%
  dplyr::arrange(
    i,
    minimum_wage
  ) %>%
  kbl() %>%
  kable_styling()
```

### graph {.tabset}
```{r, results = "asis"}
p <- 
  plot_counterfactual_minimum_wage(
    counterfactual = counterfactual
  )
```
